title: OREGON HEALTH INSURANCE MARKETPLACE - 211info
text: OREGON HEALTH INSURANCE MARKETPLACE OREGON HEALTH INSURANCE MARKETPLACE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support and resources to shop for, compare, and enroll in health coverage, likely with financial assistance. 500 Summer Street NE E-56 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Individuals who are not offered other affordable health insurance coverage through a job, Oregon Health Plan (OHP), or Medicare. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email - (855) 268-3767 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Toll-free (855) 268-3767 All relay calls accepted Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or visit website FEES: Information Services: None Income based financial assistance is available to help cover the cost of health insurance coverage DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Walk-ins not accepted. Services: General Health Insurance Information/Counseling Navigator Programs State Health Insurance Marketplace Call Centers/Websites If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON HEALTH INSURANCE MARKETPLACE
